summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Separation Alerts (Phase 2B) - Commingling Detection Engine. All 19 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: Separation Alerts Panel renders on /transactions page, alert cards display with correct severity colors (red/yellow), Scan button triggers pattern detection, Resolve dialog works with type selection and note input, History dialog shows all alerts including resolved ones with audit trail.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility) - same as iteration_68
Console warning: HTML hydration error - <tr> cannot be child of <span> - appears to be from dev tooling wrapper, not affecting functionality

seed_data_creation: Test transactions created and cleaned up during testing. Some TEST_ prefixed alerts may remain in history.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Separation Alerts (Phase 2B) fully tested. Backend endpoints: GET /api/alerts (with filters), GET /api/alerts/count, POST /api/alerts/{id}/resolve, POST /api/alerts/scan, GET /api/alerts/history all working. Alert auto-creation triggers: trust_paying_personal (red) when outflow to 'Personal/Individual/Private/Self' account not classified as Distribution/Compensation, large_unexplained (yellow) when outflow >$5k classified as Other with no memo, unlinked_governance (yellow) when Distribution/Compensation without linked governance ID. Auto-resolution works when transaction is updated to link governance action. Resolution types: classified, linked, documented, reviewed_no_issue. Frontend: SeparationAlertsPanel component renders in /transactions page with red/yellow severity badges, Scan button, History button, and Resolve dialog with type select and note input.

GET /api/alerts.details: Lists active alerts with filters (entity_id, severity, status, alert_type), enriches with entity_name

GET /api/alerts/count.details: Returns total_active, red_count, yellow_count, by_entity, by_type

POST /api/alerts/{id}/resolve.details: Resolves alert with resolution_type and resolution_note, creates immutable audit log, validates empty note rejected, validates already-resolved rejected

POST /api/alerts/scan.details: Triggers full pattern scan (round_number_recurring, same_day_reversal, unclassified_aging), returns active_alerts count

GET /api/alerts/history.details: Returns all alerts including resolved for audit trail

Alert auto-creation: trust_paying_person.details: Red alert created when outflow to personal account not classified as Distribution/Compensation

Alert auto-creation: large_unexplained.details: Yellow alert created when outflow >$5k classified as Other with no memo

Alert auto-creation: unlinked_governance.details: Yellow alert created when Distribution/Compensation without linked governance ID

Alert auto-resolution.details: Unlinked_governance alerts auto-resolved when transaction updated to link distribution_id

Frontend: SeparationAlertsPanel.details: Panel renders in /transactions page with header, alert count badges, Scan button, History button

Frontend: Alert cards.details: Cards display with correct severity colors (red/yellow backgrounds), title, description, entity name, Resolve button

Frontend: Resolve dialog.details: Opens with alert details, resolution type dropdown, resolution note textarea, submit button

Frontend: History dialog.details: Shows all alerts with severity badges, status badges (active/resolved), resolution notes for resolved alerts

Frontend: No-alerts state.details: Could not test as there are active alerts in the system
